risks.title: Write token scope
risks.notes: The cloud board commits to TASKS.md, so the GitHub token needs write access. Scoped to this repo only; stored as a Vercel secret.

risks.title: GitHub API rate limits
risks.notes: Only the active tab polls; a token raises the limit to 5,000/hour.

risks.title: Memory only as good as the habit
risks.notes: The second-brain value depends on sessions/handoffs actually being written each session (see CLAUDE.md checklist).
